title: Add --whisperer-model CLI flag
description: Thread the model name from the CLI through the adapter factory so users can select which LLM model the Whisperer uses. Default is claude-haiku-4-5.

criteria.description: make_adapter() in whisperdeep/adapter_factory.py accepts an optional model parameter and passes it to AnthropicAdapter and OpenAIAdapter when provided.
testSteps: Call make_adapter('anthropic', model='claude-haiku-4-5') — monkeypatching ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to a dummy value so construction doesn't raise.
Assert the returned adapter's .model attribute equals 'claude-haiku-4-5'.
Call make_adapter('anthropic') with no model argument and assert .model is not None (uses adapter's own default).
criteria.threshold: model is threaded through when provided; adapter default used when omitted.

criteria.description: Game.from_seed() accepts an optional model parameter and passes it to make_adapter().
testSteps: Construct Game.from_seed(seed=1, whisperer=True, adapter='offline') — offline adapter ignores model, no error.
Inspect the Game.from_seed signature; confirm it has a model parameter.
Call with model='claude-haiku-4-5' and adapter='offline' — should construct without error.
criteria.threshold: Game.from_seed accepts model kwarg without error.

criteria.description: --whisperer-model flag exists in the CLI with default 'claude-haiku-4-5' and appears in --help output.
testSteps: Run: python -m whisperdeep --help and capture stdout.
Assert the string 'whisperer-model' appears in stdout.
Assert the string 'claude-haiku-4-5' appears in stdout (default shown in help).
criteria.threshold: --whisperer-model is documented in --help with default claude-haiku-4-5.

criteria.description: --whisperer-model value is threaded into the adapter. When --whisperer offline --whisperer-model claude-haiku-4-5 is used, the game runs without error.
Existing headless run without --whisperer-model still works (backward compatible).
testSteps: Run: pytest tests/ and assert all tests pass.
criteria.threshold: All prior tests pass; headless runs succeed without the new flag.

outOfScope: Changing AnthropicAdapter or OpenAIAdapter internals beyond accepting the model parameter (they already do).
Adding model validation (unknown model names are passed through; the adapter/API handles errors).
Changing OfflineAdapter or NullAdapter (model param is irrelevant for them).
